---
title: "Features"
sidebar: en
---

Projet is a focused mobile client — not a replacement for the OpenProject web UI. It covers the actions you need on the move.

## Modules

| Area | What it does |
|------|--------------|
| **Project list** | Every project visible to you. |
| **Work-package list** | Work packages in the selected project with type, status, assignee. |
| **Filters** | By status (open, in progress, …), assignee, type. |
| **Detail view** | Description, responsible, priority, due date, history. |
| **Actions** | Set status, assign, change due date. |

## Workflows

| Goal | In the app |
|------|------------|
| Triage your open work | Filters → "Assigned to me" + "Open" → list. |
| Claim a task | Detail → Assignee → pick a person. |
| Mark something done | Detail → Status → new status → confirm. |
| Push a due date | Detail → Due date → new date → save. |

## Auth & network

| Aspect | Behaviour |
|--------|-----------|
| Auth | OAuth token in the `Authorization: Bearer …` header. |
| Endpoint | only the configured OpenProject URL. |
| Data format | HAL+JSON (OpenProject API v3). |
| Other hosts | not contacted. |

## Where to get it

| Channel | App |
|---------|-----|
| App Store (iOS) · Google Play (Android) | Etabli Projet |
| F-Droid — main repository | Etabli Projet |
| Source code | [`etabli-dev/etabli-projet`](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-projet) |
